milestone.phase: Vite + TypeScript project in game/. iconify-icon for sprites. DOM renderer, no game framework. index.html boots to a title bar proving the stack works.
Entity types, combat/skill/narrative stat shapes, rune data, spell data, floor/room graph data. All content authored under src/content as TS modules. Pure-data layer — no UI yet.
Title screen with "New Game". HUD bar (name, HP bar, Mana bar, floor, tick, crystals). Scene router. Persisted save via localStorage.
Room view with room-type icon, themed background per type, exit buttons. Walk 3+ rooms on floor 1 without softlock. Fog reveal on entry.
Turn-based combat: Fight / Spells / Bag / Run. Visible HP/mana bars, enemy sprite, damage numbers. Victory returns to room view.
Rune forge scene. 5 runes, 6+ authored combinations, ingenuity clause: unknown combos still produce a valid spell via "ingenuity" recipe. Craft -> equip -> usable in combat.

Floor 1 Stone Warden (physical-resist, demands DoT/burn). Floor 2 Mirror Djinn (reflects direct damage, demands DoT/summon). Elite on each floor that strongly favors a crafted spell. Second floor with distinct constraint and boss.
Event room with NPC portrait (iconify), text, choices. At least one choice grants a rune or crystal.
Map overlay, Spellbook overlay, Traits overlay (narrativeStats). Toggle from HUD. Esc closes.
Full playthrough test, visual consistency pass, CONVENTIONS.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, production build, VERIFICATION.md with 4 gates.
